title: Purple Day Act
description: Purple Day Act (Purple Day Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Purple Day Act .

provisions.title: Purple Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the 26th day of March is to be known as “Purple Day”.

provisions.title: Wearing purple
provisions.content: 3 On the 26th day of March, people are encouraged to wear the colour purple to indicate their support for people with epilepsy and to increase public awareness of this disorder.

provisions.title: Not a legal holiday
provisions.content: 4 For greater certainty, Purple Day is not a legal holiday or a non-juridical day.
